rows.description: Little Pew, Brewer Gardiner (Burden's) pro anno
rows.notes: Monetary values (£3, 7s, 11½d) were in full consensus between both extractors. Description has minor variations ('Burden's' vs 'Burdens', 'anno' vs 'Anno'), chose 'Burden's' and 'anno' as it appeared slightly closer in the image.
rows.english_description: Annual rent for the Little Pew property paid by Brewer Gardiner (associated with Burden's).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent for the Little Pew property paid by Brewer Gardiner (Burden's), amounting to £3 7s 11½d.

rows.notes: Monetary values (£1, 6s, ¾d) were in full consensus. Description differed: 'Thame brundel' (gemini-flash) vs 'Framebrundel' (gpt-5-mini) and 'Minchins' (gemini-flash) vs 'Minchin' (gpt-5-mini). Visual verification clearly shows 'Framebrundel' and a faint 's' after 'Minchin', leading to the combined description '— Framebrundel (Minchins) pro bien:'.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent for the Framebrundel holding associated with the Minchins name.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent for the Framebrundel holding (Minchins), amounting to £1 6s ¾d.

rows.notes: Monetary values (£7, 9s, 11d) were in full consensus. Description differed: 'Wm Heywood pro Hien.' (gemini-flash) vs 'Mrs Heywood pro Frien.' (gpt-5-mini). Visual verification clearly shows 'Wm' and 'Hien.', confirming gemini-flash's reading for the description.
rows.english_description: Half‑year (dimidiate) rent payment from William Heywood.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑year rent payment from William Heywood, amounting to £7 9s 11d.

rows.notes: Monetary values (0s, 13s, 4d) were in full consensus. Description differed: '(Sester's)' (gemini-flash) vs '(Hester's)' (gpt-5-mini). Visual verification clearly shows an 'H', confirming gpt-5-mini's reading for the description. Used gpt-5-mini's 'Anno' capitalization.
rows.english_description: Annual rent paid by Brewer Gardiner relating to Hester's holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent paid by Brewer Gardiner for Hester's, amounting to £0 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on description and monetary values (£1, 16s, 1d) between both extractors. Visual confirmation is also clear.
rows.english_description: Payment recorded from Widow Ryman (tenant or payer).
